overview: Student AI Buddy is a conversational learning companion that helps students ask questions, receive step-by-step tutoring, take practice quizzes, track their progress, and discover knowledge gaps — all powered by an AI inference backend and a rule-based knowledge system.
features: Conversational AI chat with natural language questions and step-by-step answers
Practice quizzes with instant feedback and adaptive difficulty
Progress dashboard showing mastered topics, weak areas, and study streaks
Knowledge gap detection and AI-powered study topic suggestions
Internet Identity login with persistent student profiles
Chat history with session summaries and topic search
Socratic method AI responses with hints and guided explanations
Mobile-first responsive design with light and dark modes
